title: Duzzit Multi Surface Wipes - Contains Natural Orange Oil | 100% Biodegradable - Made From Plant Fibres | Suitable for Kitchens, Bathrooms, Offices & More (60 Wipes, Orange)
features: ALL-IN-ONE SURFACE CLEANER: These multi surface wipes are ideal for use in kitchens, bathrooms, living rooms and more. Clean up everyday mess from worktops, toilets, sinks, showers, and tiles in seconds. A brilliant all-rounder in any collection of cleaning supplies.

100% BIODEGRADABLE MATERIALS: Made from plant fibres, these biodegradable cleaning wipes offer a sustainable way to clean. They break down naturally over time, reducing waste without compromising on cleaning power. Great for homes looking to reduce plastic use.

FRESH CITRUS FRAGRANCE: Infused with natural orange oil, these wipes leave behind a clean and uplifting scent. Use them after wiping down bins, countertops, or bathroom tiles for a long-lasting burst of freshness. A must-have surface cleaner for everyday use.

PERFECT FOR BATHROOM CLEANING: These wipes double as a bathroom cleaner and toilet wipe, easily tackling soap scum, water marks and more. Use on showers, sinks or around the toilet to maintain a hygienic bathroom between deep cleans.

NO NEED FOR SPRAYS OR CLOTHS: Duzzit wipes offer a quick and convenient way to clean without extra tools. Simply pull from the pack and wipe away mess on microwaves, ovens, or even front doors. The ideal choice for fast, no-fuss cleaning.

KITCHEN GREASE BUSTER: These wipes cut through grease on hobs, tiles and worktops, making kitchen clean-ups effortless. Wipe down surfaces after cooking to keep things spotless. A handy go-to in any kitchen’s cleaning products range.

RESEALABLE 60 PACK: Each pack includes 60 strong wipes and features a resealable top to keep them fresh. Tuck into a kitchen drawer, bathroom cupboard, or keep in the car for unexpected spills. Always ready when you need them.

SAFE ON MULTIPLE SURFACES: Suitable for use on a wide range of surfaces including plastic, stainless steel, glass, tiles and ceramic. Use in any room – from wiping hallway skirting boards to freshening up living room shelves.

GREAT FOR QUICK TOUCH-UPS: Perfect for daily cleaning or quick wipe-downs before guests arrive. Use these surface wipes to revive dull tiles, clean light switches or refresh bathroom taps. A fast and easy fix for busy households.

ESSENTIAL CLEANING SUPPLIES: These Duzzit wipes are a must-have in every home’s cleaning cupboard. Whether used as tile cleaner, shower cleaner or toilet wipes, they offer a reliable and effective clean every time.
description: Product Description Keep every room fresh and clean with Duzzit Multi Surface Wipes – a powerful, eco-friendly solution for everyday mess. These biodegradable wipes are made from plant fibres and infused with natural orange oil to cut through grease, grime, and dirt with ease. Whether you're tackling the bathroom, sprucing up the kitchen, or giving your hallway a quick refresh, these versatile wipes make cleaning simple and satisfying. They’re tough on mess, gentle on skin, and leave behind a fresh citrus scent that brightens any space. With 60 wipes in a handy resealable pack, these surface wipes are ideal for daily use – at home, in the car, or even at work. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Perfume, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Linalyl Acetate, Methylisothiazolinone, Benzisothiazolinone. Directions * Peel back resealable label on the front of pack * Remove wipes as required * Wipe across surface and leave to dry. * Ensure kitchen surfaces are completely dry after use and before food preparation/storage. * Carefully reseal pack after use to prevent wipes from drying out.
